run_summary.text: As the sun began to set, Lumo and Oro shared a final meal under the cover of darkness. The fireflies danced around them, casting a warm glow over their faces. Lumo whispered a silent prayer of gratitude to the forest spirits for guiding them through the challenges of their journey. As they sat side by side, watching the stars twinkle above, Lumo knew that they had overcome many obstacles together. Oro nodded in agreement, his eyes full of respect and admiration for Lumo's strength and courage. With their bond strengthened, they knew that they would face whatever challenges came next, ready to support each other through thick and thin.
